    G

    generate() - Static method in class ui.gui.views.GenerateResultFile
    Generates a result file with the following information: - Number of users by year of birth - Average loan duration - Number of books containing a specific word in the title
    GenerateResultFile - Class in ui.gui.views
    This class generates a result file with the following information: - Number of users by year of birth - Average loan duration - Number of books containing a specific word in the title
    GenerateResultFile() - Constructor for class ui.gui.views.GenerateResultFile
     
    Genre - Class in models
    This class represents a genre in the database.
    Genre(int, String) - Constructor for class models.Genre
    Constructor to create a Genre object with the specified ID and name.
    GenreAddForm - Class in ui.gui.forms.genre
    This class represents a form for adding a new genre.

    Constructor for the GenreAddForm.
    GenreDAO - Class in dao.controllers
    This class is used to manage genres in the database.

    Constructor for GenreDAO.
    GenreDeleteForm - Class in ui.gui.forms.genre
    This class represents a form for confirming the deletion of a genre.

    Constructor for the GenreDeleteForm.

    This abstract class serves as a base for genre-related forms in the application.

    This class represents the GUI for managing genres.

    This class represents a form for modifying an existing genre.

    This method retrieves a loan by its ID from the database.

    This method is used to get a connection to the database.

    Gets the date when the book was borrowed.

    Gets the actual return date of the book.

    Gets the duration of the loan in days.

    Get the genre of the book.
